summary: Plan-only inventory classification for five open PR candidates. No shared canonical was selected because the job identifies this as a mixed live PR inventory shard. No close, merge, fix, or raise-PR actions are planned; low-signal closeout and merge/fix paths are disabled by the job frontmatter. Security-sensitive linked refs are quarantined separately.

actions.reason: Useful open Slack/progress PR with proof and review context; keep it out of closeout and leave maintainer review as the next path.
